author: Fabricio Zillig
description: Run and observe agentmd agents from inside Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: Agentmd

releases.author: z-fab
releases.description:
Obsidian plugin to run and observe **agentmd** agents from your vault.

### Highlights
- **Single sidebar panel** with **Agents / Live / History** tabs and drill-down detail (agent config + execution log and final answer).
- Run agents (optionally with the active note), watch **live** executions with an animated running state, and stop runs from the panel.
- **History** with status/agent/period filters and status-colored results.
- **Per-agent emoji** (from the agent's `icon`, resolved by agentmd, with a deterministic fallback).
- Configurable **accent color**, friendly **offline/empty** states, and one-click **Start backend**.

### Requirements
- [agentmd](https://github.com/z-fab/agentmd) **v0.14.0+** running locally. Desktop-only. All communication is local (Unix socket); the plugin sends no vault data to external services and has no telemetry.

### Manual install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/agentmd/`, then enable **Agentmd** under Settings → Community plugins.

releases.author: z-fab
releases.description:
## AgentMD for Obsidian — v0.1.0

First release of the Obsidian plugin for [agentmd](https://github.com/z-fab/agentmd).

### Features

- **Agents panel** — list all agents with trigger type, model, and one-click run buttons
- **Live view** — real-time running executions (polls API every 2s)
- **Execution detail** — streaming log with live tool calls → completed view with Markdown final answer, token breakdown (input/output/total), and collapsible execution log
- **Executions history** — filterable by status (All/Success/Failed/Aborted), agent, and period (Today/7d/30d/All) with pagination
- **Agent detail** — dashboard with stats, recent runs, configuration, and action buttons
- **Settings tab** — socket path, agents directory, auto-open, notifications, poll interval
- **Scheduler controls** — pause/resume from command palette
- **Status bar** — pulsing green `● AgentMD` when online, dim gray when offline
- **Offline state** — clean centered message replaces all content when backend is down
- **Ribbon icon** — quick access to Agents panel

### Requirements

- Obsidian 1.5+ (Desktop only)
- [agentmd](https://github.com/z-fab/agentmd) v0.8.0+

### Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release. Copy them into your vault:

```bash
VAULT=/path/to/your/vault
mkdir -p "$VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/agentmd-obsidian"
cp main.js manifest.json styles.css "$VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/agentmd-obsidian/"
```

Enable in Obsidian: Settings → Community plugins → toggle "agentmd" on.

### Architecture

100% API-driven — every view fetches data from the agentmd HTTP backend (source of truth). Communication via Unix domain socket. No local caching of stale data.
releases.name: v0.1.0 — First Release
